zh.lifeSummary: 當Joane Wood於1574年9月27日出生在英國賀特福爾黑費爾德時，她的父親John Woode23歲，母親Marcy Smythe19歲。她於1597年1月4日與William Thake在英國賀特福爾羅伊斯頓結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1621年5月14日在英國英格蘭賀特福爾巴可瓦享年46歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀特福爾巴可瓦。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joane Wood于1574年9月27日出生在英国賀特福爾黑費爾德时，她的父亲John Woode23岁，母亲Marcy Smythe19岁。她于1597年1月4日与William Thake在英国賀特福爾羅伊斯頓结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1621年5月14日在英国英格兰賀特福爾巴可瓦享年46岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀特福爾巴可瓦。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Joane
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

variants.name: Johanne
meanings: and Norwegian feminine form of   Johan .

variants.name: Joann
meanings: From Old French Jo(h)anne, and so a doublet of Joan . This too was revived as a given name in its own right in the first half of the 20th century. It has to some extent been influenced by the independently formed combination Jo Anne.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

en.lifeSummary: When Joane Wood was born on 27 September 1574, in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, her father, John Woode, was 23 and her mother, Marcy Smythe, was 19. She married William Thake on 4 January 1597, in Royston, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died on 14 May 1621, in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 46, and was buried in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joane Wood est née le 27 septembre 1574, à Therfield, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, son père, John Woode, avait 23 ans et sa mère, Marcy Smythe, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé William Thake le 4 janvier 1597, à Royston, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée le 14 mai 1621, à Barkway, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 46 ans, et a été enterrée à Barkway, Hertfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Joane Wood am 27. September 1574 in Therfield, Hertfordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater John Woode 23 und ihre Mutter Marcy Smythe 19. Sie hat am 4. Januar 1597 in Royston, Hertfordshire, England William Thake geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb am 14. Mai 1621 im Alter von 46 Jahren in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Barkway, Hertfordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Wood è nata il il 27 settembre 1574 nel Therfield, Hertfordshire, England, sua padre, John Woode, aveva 23 anni e sua madre, Marcy Smythe, aveva 19 anni. Lei sposato William Thake il 4 gennaio 1597, nel Royston, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 14 maggio 1621, nel Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 46 anni, e fu sepolta a Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Joane Woodが1574年9月27日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアスエルフィールドで生まれた時，父John Woodeは23歳，母Marcy Smytheは19歳であった。1597年1月4日にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアロイストンでWilliam Thakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1621年5月14日にイギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークワイで46歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハートフォードシュアイアバークワイにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Joane Wood(이)가 1574년 9월 27일 영국 허트퍼드실르 서르필드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Woode(은)는 23세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marcy Smythe(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1597년 1월 4일 영국 허트퍼드실르 로이스턴에서 William Thake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1621년 5월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 바k웨이에서 46세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허트퍼드실르 바k웨이에 묻혔다.

pt.27 September 1574–14 May 1621: 27 de setembro de 1574–14 de maio de 1621
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Joane Wood nasceu em 27 de setembro de 1574, em Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Woode, tinha 23 anos e sua mãe, Marcy Smythe, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com William Thake em 4 de janeiro de 1597, em Royston, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu em 14 de maio de 1621, em Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 46 anos, e foi sepultada em Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joane Wood родилась 27 сентября 1574 г. в местности тирфиелд, хиртфордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени John Woode было 23 года, а матери, которую звали Marcy Smythe, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Thake 4 января 1597 г. в местности роистон, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла 14 мая 1621 г. в местности барквеи, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 46 лет и была похоронена в местности барквеи, хиртфордшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.27 September 1574–14 May 1621: 27 de septiembre de 1574–14 de mayo de 1621
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Joane Wood nació el 27 de septiembre de 1574, en Therfield, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, John Woode, tenía 23 años y su mamá, Marcy Smythe, tenía 19 años. Se casó con William Thake el 4 de enero de 1597, en Royston, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1621, en Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 46 años, y fue sepultada en Barkway, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
